ChildProfile.title: Child Profile
ChildProfile.description: Basic information about the child including birth date and gestational age.

sex.description: The biological sex of the child.

gestationalWeeks.description: Gestational weeks at birth (for premature correction).

gestationalDays.description: Gestational days at birth (for premature correction).

Measurement.title: Growth Measurement
Measurement.description: A single measurement record for height and weight at a specific date.

date.description: The date the measurement was taken.

age.description: Decimal age in years at the time of measurement.

correctedAge.description: Corrected decimal age in years for premature infants.

obesityIndex.description: Obesity index (%) based on height-specific standard weight.

/children/{childId}/measurements/{measur.description: Sub-collection of measurements for each child.
